name: AWARE — AI-agent governance import
description: Imports from AWARE (github.com/GoodCISO/aware, Apache-2.0) — open-source autonomous-compliance infrastructure for AI agent systems. AWARE governs autonomous agents with a cryptographic non-human identity, audit trails, a parent→child revocation cascade (kill-switch), constraint-enforcement tiers T0–T4, and compliance mapping to CSA AICM / NIST AI RMF / ISO 27001 / DORA / OWASP-LLM. This connector parses an AWARE export (its governed-agent registry + policy/guardrail violations) and maps it to XORCISM: governed agents → XAGENT.AIAGENT carrying their AWARE tier, identity fingerprint and parent (surfaced in the /aware governance cockpit and AI Guardrails), and enforcement/policy violations → XAGENT.AIGUARDRAILVIOLATION. Worker-safe & read-only: parses an exported JSON only.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An AWARE export JSON: governed agents (with tier / identity / parent) and optional policy/guardrail violations.
